hints.text: Mostly **desert** w/ little vegetation; **dry mountains** on the north coast + some on the south coast
Plates: private **yellow**, commercial **red**; white **taxis w/ orange side panels**
Coverage = **white pickup** (usually fully blurred; sometimes antenna or the front is visible)
Roads yellow outer / white middle; **black-and-yellow curbs** (also common in UAE)
Buildings **light stone, blocky but ornate**, usually with matching ornate fences & gates
**Striped signposts** (in the ME only Oman + UAE); directional signs blue in Arabic + English
**Wooden poles**, 3 pole-top designs — the one w/ a **metal triangle above the pole is unique to Oman**; poles are commoner here than in UAE/Qatar
**Black-yellow chevrons with many arrows**; **red-and-white painted pylons**; **be'ah** garbage bins (numbers on them = region)
